**Do not report security vulnerabilities here.** See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / logs
If applicable, add screenshots or console/backend logs (redact any tokens/cookies).

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11 / macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04]
- Launch method: [start.ps1 / start.sh / Docker]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- Node version: [e.g. 20]
- GraphRaider version / commit: [e.g. v1.0.0 or commit hash]
- Evaluation mode: [Rule-Based / Hybrid / Full Claude]

## Additional context
Anything else that might help.
